## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] perf

## Conventional Commit Suggestion

<!-- Example: feat(songs): add sheet version filter -->
`type(scope): short description`

## Screenshots / Demo (if UI)

- Before:
- After:

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] Manually tested affected pages/flows
- [ ] No obvious regressions

## Release Notes

<!-- Mention if this should trigger patch/minor/major and why -->
- Suggested bump: `patch | minor | major`
- Notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows project coding style
- [ ] Updated documentation (README or inline docs) if needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added
- [ ] Linked issue/ticket (if available)

## Related Issue

Closes #
